title: Associated Poops - YTPC Reports (YTP News) Segment:  Deepercutt vs Captpan6 YTP TENNIS REMATCH?
description:

AP SEGMENT:  Deepercutt vs Captpan6 YTP TENNIS REMATCH?

Associated Poops is a new segment I've added to YTPC Reports. Things have been a little on the gloomy side lately with all of the celebrity deaths and YTP resignations. So, with this new segment I attempt to bring back the lighter side of YTP back.
